def normalize_dataset(records):
    for rec in records:
        rec["name"] = rec["name"].strip().lower()
        rec["email"] = rec["email"].strip().lower()
        rec["phone"] = rec["phone"].replace("-", "").replace(" ", "")
    return records


def clean_prices(items):
    for item in items:
        price = round(float(item["price"]), 2)
        tax = price * 0.1
        item["price"] = price
        item["tax"] = tax
        item["total"] = price + tax
    return items
